Duriek Bloodpool  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded January 27th, 2022 by Drewinette

  • This mob spawns at +905, -98, +20.06 in the guardtower overlooking the newbie area.
  • Mob sees through invisibility: Yes
  • Findable (via Ctrl-F): No

Categories: Templatized | EverQuest
This page last modified 2022-01-27 20:43:00.

Level: 55
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-01-28 21:01:14
Items Given:
Corrupted Ghoulbane

Known Habitats:
  Paineel
Factions Decreased:
  Truespirit
Quests:
  Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Report a correction

Post Comment
Despawns upon turn in
QuoteReply
# May 26 2019 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
DoctaJay
Sage
90 posts
Spawns in guardtower overlooking newbie area, you don't need to go into the city.

Despawns when you turn in the items.
▲ Page top
spawn timer
QuoteReply
# Oct 01 2014 at 3:49 AM Rating: Good
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
Saturday, September 27 2014 at12:51:31 , I MQ'd the soul leech to someone. I knew if 2 other SK's who wanted it as well and we got lucky on drops. We checked every 2 - 6 hours once past the 36 hour point and this npc was not up at any time between 36 hours and 72 hours. we DID find him up on Tuesday, Sep 30 2014 at 23:16:25 2014], so his spawn time span was 3 days we suppose. we have to do 1 more, so hopefully we can give more info in 3 days.
▲ Page top
spawn time
QuoteReply
# Feb 27 2008 at 6:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1684714624345
9 posts
What is the respawn time for Duriek Bloodpool?
I have been waiting 2 weeks straight for this guy to spawn but to no avail

Edited, Apr 13th 2008 7:34pm by OdieDG
▲ Page top
Spawn time
QuoteReply
# Feb 18 2007 at 10:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591799905573
4 posts
Does anyone have a spawn time for this guy? I have been trying to find him up for 2 days now.
▲ Page top
Duriek spawm time
QuoteReply
# Oct 07 2006 at 8:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591907243745
2 posts
Duriek was not up Thursday afternoon 10/5... he didn't pop back up TILL Saturday morning or earlier till 10/7 so ill say he's about 48 respawn after someone courrupts the ghoulbane... hope this helps... and now we have an estimated spawn time... GL my fellow dark brothers!
▲ Page top
stupid mob
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2006 at 3:08 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591840807604
2 posts
does this mob despwan after the note is turned in any info would be helpful
▲ Page top
Duriek's loc
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2005 at 2:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609114694105
118 posts
Duriek Bloodpool spawns at loc 905, -100 in the battlement overlooking the newbie area to the East as you enter Paineel. Conned apprehensivly to me when I turned in the "note" and the "cough elixer". Both turn ins were a sucsess. Don't know about spawn time. He was up when I went looking for him. Rumored to be on the Truespirit faction.
▲ Page top
Spawn rate
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2002 at 12:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773693569
3 posts
I had to have a GM wax this guy since he would not reset back to his "spot." He was pacing around in the newbie area and would not respond to hails for turn in of epic pieces. I have been waiting for him for nearly 48 hours and he still has not spawned. Does anyone know the actual spawn time on this guy?
▲ Page top
faction
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 7:27 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793169098
143 posts
This guy is on some strange faction.

I checked him with my WE Druud, DE necros, WE Ranger, DE Enchater. He is always eitrher Aprehensive (to good races) or dubios to evils. He is NOT on heretic faction and doesn't agro if you kiling Noclin or Azzar.


He doesn't seem to see invis either
▲ Page top
RE: faction
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2002 at 1:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1630282858106
Scholar
83 posts
This guy is on True Spirit Faction, noone will start out KoS to him.
▲ Page top
Dubious
QuoteReply
# May 07 2002 at 4:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251924332
Scholar
303 posts
He cons dubious to my Dark Elf wizard of agnostic faith. At the point I conned him, I did almost nothing in the way of any kind of faction, so this is his "clean" response to a dark elf agnostic wizard. I hope this helps other dark elves to gauge what their con might be towards him. Innoruuk folllowers and shadow knights will probably con better than I did, but that's just a guess.
▲ Page top
RE: Dubious
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2004 at 4:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774791355
Scholar
38 posts
This guy starts out dubious to everyone. I have had to do faction work with while working on my epic. This expensive and time consuming. A dusty tome dropped from a ratman guard and cough elixir bought 1k in neriak and a note dropped of a 55 rogue after giving 900pp and 3 pieces of long camp armor will raise your faction the only way I have found to this.
▲ Page top
RE: Dubious
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2004 at 11:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592258732767
66 posts
Use hide, sneak, or have someone cast invis on you to get to INDIFF, which is all you need for the turn ins.
▲ Page top
Broken spawn?
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2002 at 8:59 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248555066
43 posts
I waited for Duriek for 2 hours but he never appeared so that I could turn in the letter that Kurron Ni dropped when I killed him. This guy was always here when I was not working on my epic. He usually spawns in the tower overlooking to n00bie area in Paineel.
▲ Page top
see invis?
QuoteReply
# Jan 17 2002 at 6:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761195679
203 posts
I picked up azzar's hat on my way through the warrens. I'm a ranger, so I can camo my way in, and sneak for the turn-in, but not if I'm getting pounded on by a level 55. Does this guys see invis? Or, I notice that he's not on heretics faction, so will he maybe con dubious to a wood elf ranger?
▲ Page top
Duriek
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 10:52 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
is the guy always up or does he depop any info would be great
▲ Page top
RE: Duriek
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2002 at 10:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250460803
View User Forum
18 posts
Duriek is always up unless an SK has turned in the Ghoulbane, Soul Leech, Decrepit Sheath, and Blade of Abrogation as part of the SK epic. If you follow the storyline, he puts the swords together to fashion the Corrupted Ghoulbane, and the process of making it actually kills him and you receive the Corrupted Ghoulbane. Hence, he is not up when an sk has quested the CG. No idea on spawn time though.

58 TSK
▲ Page top
SK NPC
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2001 at 1:40 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This NPC is on the True Spirit faction. Namely, if you're not a shadowknight he will con dubious (or worse, I do not know) to you. He is also part of the SK epic -- you cannot do the SK epic if you con dubious to him.
▲ Page top
Not on Heretics faction
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 8:53 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591755902996
Sage
293 posts
This NPC is on a different faction than the Heretics. I'm not sure which one, but he cons differently than most of the other NPCs in Paineel.

▲ Page top
Faction

Can anyone tell me where Duriek is generally or specifically found in Paineel? Thanks. =)
▲ Page top
RE: Loc?
QuoteReply
# May 15 2001 at 7:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756701976
57 posts
He spawns in the area behind the windows in the little stone battlement over the entrance to the newbie zone. Next to Azzar Habib.
▲ Page top
RE: Loc
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2001 at 5:07 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm looking at Duriek right now. He's pacing back and forth here in the Paineel newbie area, right under the windows. Was dubious to me so he didnt respond to hailing.
